intent_template: Which flower appears to be supported by a stem that is all thorns; Euphorbia milii var. splendens or Paphiopedilum fairrieanum?
intent: Which flower appears to be supported by a stem that is all thorns; Euphorbia milii var. splendens or Paphiopedilum fairrieanum?

fuzzy_match: Euphorbia milii var. splendens flowers appear to be supported by a stem that is all thorns, and Paphiopedilum fairrieanum flowers do not.
